steps.title: Identify the evidence structure
steps.content: The strongest signal is “For example” paired with a specific comparison: the first join exhibits “clear misalignment,” whereas the later joins are “virtually invisible.” This structure provides concrete evidence for a claim made earlier.

steps.title: Connect to the answer
steps.content:
This is evidence supporting an argument about the workers—the function choice B identifies.

The other choices describe functions absent from the sentence: identifying depicted subjects, comparing to other tapestries, or explaining research methods.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
